CalendarGoogleCal

11jul10:30 am6:00 pmSocial River Run - Hampton Court to W*king

Event Details

This r*n will go ahead unless it’s p*ssing it down on the day. Do you like beer? Do you like running? Did I mention the beer? The completely unofficial and utterly disorganised

Event Details

This r*n will go ahead unless it’s p*ssing it down on the day.

Do you like beer? Do you like running? Did I mention the beer?

The completely unofficial and utterly disorganised River Run is back again on older, shorter, route! This ~23 km (~13 miles) pub run (mostly) along the Thames and the Wey will be happening on Saturday 11th July.

This will be a relaxed group run and all abilities are welcome as are hash hounds. It will be flat, there will be pubs, and it will be fun. It has been thrown together so that people can drop in/out as they wish either at pubs or nearby stations.

Meet at Guildford Station around 09:00 to catch the 09:19 train to Hampton Court (changing at Woking), arriving at 10:12. We will be aiming to set off around 10:30 once everyone is comfortable. We will run down to Hampton Court and then run back along the rivers to Woking calling at several pubs along the way.

There will be at least 5 pub stops along the route, although we may add others depending on how the group feels. Some suggestions for both pubs and bail out points are below. If you’re planning on joining us part way along the route then keep an eye on Facebook and/or message me.

0 km – Start: Hampton Court station

6 km – The Weir Hotel @ Walton (KT12 2JB)

7.2 km –The Anglers @ Walton (KT12 2PF)

— (Shepperton station is ~3 km from here)

10.3 km – The Old Crown @ Weybridge (KT13 8LP)

(Weybridge station is ~2.5 km from here)

14.5 km – The White Hart @ New Haw (KT15 2DS)

— This is on the opposite side of the river – cross at the bridge

— (Byfleet & New Haw station is ~1 km from here)

17.5 km – The Station @ West Byfleet (KT14 6DR)

— (Next to West Byfleet station)

23 km – Wetherspoons @ Woking (GU21 5AJ)

I estimate that we will arrive in Woking around 18:00ish, but that will depend on how long we tarry at the various stops.

more

Time

(Saturday) 10:30 am - 6:00 pm(GMT+00:00)
